title: lemonia rosea
intro: Lemonia rosea, also known as the rose mallow or marsh mallow, is a perennial plant with soft, velvety leaves and showy pink or white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and demulcent properties, making it useful for soothing sore throats, digestive issues, and skin irritations. The health benefits of lemonia rosea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Lemonia rosea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, with its roots and leaves often being used to make marshmallow root tea and salves for topical application.
